title: Miner's Enchant
description: adds enchantment that improves the  mining experience. adds 3x3 mining, a way to make things unbreaking and more.
body: # Miner's Enchant set of mining enchantment for Mining tools such as pickaxe and shovels. got inspired by; - Draylar's Fabric Hammer and Excavator - [QuEnchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/qu-enchantments) , They got a more balanced implementation of this with bunch more cool enchants. ## Content **Excavator** [ for Mining tools ] - allows mining in 3x3 area, cost of extra durability damage (per block)[] - has 2 levels (level is depth, lvl 1 has no depth, lvl 2 has depth of 1) - treasure enchantment - not compatible with Fortune/Silk Touch. ``` expected use case of this enchantment is the player would carry an additional tool just for area mining in conjunction with their silk touch and Fortune tools. ``` **Unbreaking X** [Mining tools/Weapons] (planned) - makes tools completely not take durability damage - meant to be unreachable by normal means (use other modded methods to push to this level) ## License Its under the CC0 license. Feel free to learn from it and incorporate it in your own projects. ## maintenance i personally wont backport to anything before 1.20. feel free to do so yourself
